name: Standard user successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: The application is accessible and the login page is reachable
The standard_user account exists and is active in the system
No active session exists for the user (cookies/session storage cleared)
Browser is launched and pointed to the base URL

steps.action: Navigate to the base URL of the application
steps.expected: The Login Page is displayed with a username field, password field, and a Login button visible

steps.action: Verify the Login Page elements are present
steps.expected: Username input field, password input field, and Login button are all visible and enabled; no error messages are displayed

steps.action: Enter the username into the Username field
steps.expected: The username field displays 'standard_user' and no validation error appears

steps.action: Enter the password into the Password field
steps.expected: The password field displays masked characters (e.g. dots or asterisks) and no validation error appears
The Login button registers the click and the application processes the authentication request

steps.action: Verify the browser URL has changed after login
steps.expected: The browser URL now ends with '/inventory.html', confirming the redirect occurred

steps.action: Verify the Products Page header is displayed
steps.expected: The page heading reads 'Products' and the product inventory grid is visible

steps.action: Verify no error messages are present on the Products Page
steps.expected: No error banners, toast notifications, or inline error messages are displayed on the page

steps.action: Verify the shopping cart icon is visible in the top navigation
steps.expected: The shopping cart icon is displayed in the header, indicating a fully authenticated session

postconditions: The user is logged in and the session is active on the Products Page
No error state exists in the application
